_publications._publicationTitle: Quality of life in individuals with neurofibromatosis type 1 associated cutaneous neurofibromas: validation of the Dutch cNF-Skindex
_publications._context: The cNF-Skindex is an 18-item questionnaire, including three domains: 'functioning', 'emotions', and 'symptoms'. Each item is scored on a 7-point Likert scale

basicInfo.description: 18-item questionnaire assessing quality of life in individuals with NF1-associated cutaneous neurofibromas across three domains: functioning, emotions, and symptoms; scored on a 7-point Likert scale
basicInfo.psychometricProperties: Internal consistency (Cronbach's alpha); confirmatory factor analysis; three domains: functioning, emotions, symptoms
